title: RCHYFEED 4 Pack Adjustable Furniture Risers 1 inch Round, Bed Risers Heavy Duty Anti Slip Rubber, Stackable Washing Machine Riser Creates an Additional 1", 2" or 3" Sofa, Table, Desk, Chair Raisers
features: STACKABLE INCREASE HEIGHT - You can add one or more furniture risers to increase height as needed. Add height to your furniture to protect them from moisture while making cleaning easier. Each of the pad provides an elevation of 25mm(1 inches). Width: 55mm.

QUALITY RUBBER - Anti-slip pads have very good vibration absorbing abilities. Rubber feet effectively protect any floor covering, they are waterproof and non-slip. The vibration damper washing machine feet avoids contact between the washing machine cabinet insulating mat and slippery floor. Save space, put the dryer on the washing machine.

EASY TO INSTALL - No tools or messy adhesives required. Simply lift each leg of the furniture and slide the pads into place. The vibration damper washing machine feet avoids contact between the furniture and slippery floor. Waterproof and non-slip design has the best balance of floor grip, protect the floor, shock absorber noise reduction.

MULTIPLE USAGE - Place this anti-slip washing machine pad under every corner of your all furniture. Creates additional height under bed storage space. Ideal for bed, table, cabinet, desk, box, sofa, and chair at your home and office. Besides, providing stabilizing support for large appliances including washing machines, clothes dryers, mini washing machine with dryer cabinet, refrigerator.

SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - Our RCHYFFEED brand works closely with manufacturers to ensure that our products meet quality standards. If for any reason you aren't satisfied with the products , please feel free to email us and we will provide you with a full refund or free replacement.
description: Product Description Use for a Variety of Places and Furniture PREMIUM HEAVY DUTY GENUINE RUBBER Honeycomb texture design rubber that has very good vibration absorbing abilities. Reduce noise, No vibration, Non slip, No scratches any floor surface. Great gripping design of anti slip pads that securely hold in all furniture legs within 2 inch diameters. Each Furniture riser can withstand 2000 pounds, and the internal grid structure maintains the long-term stability of the bed riser. Stackable Heightening Risers to Adjust Height. Don't Worry about Furniture Sliding, Safe and Secure. Anti-vibration Rubber Foot Pads for Washing Machine and Dryer. Suitable for Wet Corners Such as Kitchens and Bathrooms, Without Worrying about Rust. Moisture Proof and Friendly to Wooden Furniture Legs. Prevent Scratches, Protect the Floor and Reduce Noise.
